hypothesis: If NEB is executed using NN-BAX with iteratively fine-tuned EquiformerV2, then NN-BAX will reproduce classical NEB minimum-energy paths for LJ7 and LJ38 transitions (meeting the same fmax convergence and low MAEi) while requiring significantly fewer expensive simulator force/energy evaluations, because the pretrained model can accurately learn and generalize the potential energy surface from limited acquired path samples.
